case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS PHILLIPS, MERCEDES V.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, MERCEDES V.
